sentences.target: On déploie le parasol sur la terrasse.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ deplwa lə paʁasɔl syʁ la teʁas/

translations.fr: On déploie le parasol sur la terrasse.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ deplwa lə paʁasɔl syʁ la teʁas/
translations.en: We’re putting up the sun umbrella on the patio.
translations.es: Abrimos la sombrilla en la terraza.
translations.de: Wir stellen den Sonnenschirm auf der Terrasse auf.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在露台上撑起遮阳伞。
translations.yue: 我哋喺露台撐開太陽傘。
translations.ru: Мы раскрываем солнечный зонт на террасе.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mở dù che nắng ở sân hiên.
translations.nl: We zetten op het terras de parasol op.
translations.uk: Ми розкриваємо сонячну парасолю на терасі.
translations.hi: हम टैरेस पर धूप की छतरी खोल रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi setter opp parasollen på terrassen.
translations.id: Kami membuka payung matahari di teras.
translations.sv: Vi sätter upp parasollet på terrassen.
translations.ro: Deschidem umbrela de soare pe terasă.
translations.da: Vi sætter parasollen op på terrassen.
translations.ja: テラスでパラソルを広げます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun used as the grammatical subject (3rd person singular in usage).
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular, transitive; agrees with the subject 'On'.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the noun 'parasol' as a direct object.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'déploie'.
Preposition marking spatial location; introduces the prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'terrasse'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Faut déployer l'antenne pour capter la radio.
sentences.reading: /fo deplwaje lɑ̃tɛn puʁ kapte la ʁadjo/

translations.fr: Faut déployer l'antenne pour capter la radio.
translations.ipa: /fo deplwaje lɑ̃tɛn puʁ kapte la ʁadjo/
translations.en: We need to extend the antenna to get radio.
translations.es: Hay que extender la antena para captar la radio.
translations.de: Wir müssen die Antenne ausfahren, um Radio zu empfangen.
translations.it: Bisogna allungare l'antenna per ricevere la radio.
translations.zh-Hans: 需要把天线拉长才能收到广播。
translations.yue: 要收到電台就要把天線拉長。
translations.ru: Нужно выдвинуть антенну, чтобы ловить радио.
translations.pt: É preciso estender a antena para captar o sinal de rádio.
translations.he: צריך להאריך את האנטנה כדי לקלוט רדיו.
translations.tr: Radyoyu almak için anteni uzatmamız gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Cần kéo dài ăng-ten để bắt sóng radio.
translations.ar: يجب تمديد الهوائي لالتقاط إشارة الراديو.
translations.nl: We moeten de antenne uitschuiven om radio te ontvangen.
translations.uk: Потрібно висунути антену, щоб ловити радіо.
translations.hu: Ki kell húzni az antennát, hogy fogjunk rádióadást.
translations.hi: रेडियो पकड़ने के लिए एंटीना बढ़ाना होगा.
translations.pl: Trzeba wysunąć antenę, żeby złapać sygnał radiowy.
translations.el: Πρέπει να επεκτείνουμε την κεραία για να πιάνουμε ραδιόφωνο.
translations.nb: Vi må trekke ut antennen for å få inn radio.
translations.id: Kita perlu memanjangkan antena agar bisa menangkap sinyal radio.
translations.sv: Vi behöver fälla ut antennen för att få in radio.
translations.ro: Trebuie să extindem antena ca să prindem semnal radio.
translations.cs: Je potřeba vysunout anténu, aby byl příjem rádia.
translations.da: Vi skal trække antennen ud for att få radio.
translations.fi: Jotta radio kuuluisi, antenni pitää vetää ulos.
translations.ja: ラジオを受信するにはアンテナを伸ばす必要があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses necessity with no explicit subject.
Infinitive verb complement governed by 'falloir' (necessity construction).
Common noun, feminine singular; includes attached clitic 'l'' (elided form of the definite article 'la'); direct object of 'déployer'.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'pour' (purpose).
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'radio' as the object of 'capter'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'capter'.

sentences.target: Nous déployons la toile de tente près de la rivière.
sentences.reading: /nu deplwajɔ̃ la twal də tɑ̃t pʁɛ də la ʁivjɛʁ/

translations.fr: Nous déployons la toile de tente près de la rivière.
translations.ipa: /nu deplwajɔ̃ la twal də tɑ̃t pʁɛ də la ʁivjɛʁ/
translations.en: We’re spreading out the tent fabric near the river.
translations.es: Estamos extendiendo la lona de la tienda cerca del río.
translations.de: Wir breiten die Zeltplane am Fluss aus.
translations.it: Stendiamo il telo della tenda vicino al fiume.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在河边把帐篷布铺开。
translations.yue: 我哋喺河邊攤開帳篷布。
translations.ru: Мы раскладываем полотно палатки у реки.
translations.pt: Estamos estendendo a lona da barraca perto do rio.
translations.he: אנחנו פורשים את יריעת האוהל ליד הנהר.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang trải tấm bạt lều gần con sông.
translations.nl: We spreiden het tentdoek uit bij de rivier.
translations.uk: Ми розкладаємо полотнище намету біля річки.
translations.hu: Kiterítjük a sátorvásznat a folyó mellett.
translations.hi: हम नदी के पास तंबू का कपड़ा फैला रहे हैं.
translations.el: Απλώνουμε το πανί της σκηνής κοντά στο ποτάμι.
translations.nb: Vi brer ut teltduken ved elven.
translations.id: Kami membentangkan kain tenda di dekat sungai.
translations.sv: Vi breder ut tältduken vid floden.
translations.da: Vi breder teltdugen ud ved floden.
translations.ja: 川のそばでテントの布を広げています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Nous'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'toile' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object; head of the compound noun phrase 'toile de tente'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement ('de tente').
Common noun, feminine singular; complement to 'toile' via the preposition 'de'.
Adverb forming part of the complex preposition 'près de' indicating proximity.
Preposition completing the locution 'près de'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'rivière'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'près de'; locative complement.

sentences.target: Vous déployez la mise à jour ce soir.
sentences.reading: /vu deplwaje la miz a ʒuʁ sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Vous déployez la mise à jour ce soir.
translations.ipa: /vu deplwaje la miz a ʒuʁ sə swaʁ/
translations.en: You’re rolling out the update tonight.
translations.es: Van a desplegar la actualización esta noche.
translations.de: Ihr rollt das Update heute Abend aus.
translations.pt: Vocês vão disponibilizar a atualização hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay các bạn sẽ triển khai bản cập nhật.
translations.nl: Jullie rollen de update vanavond uit.
translations.hi: आप लोग आज रात अपडेट जारी कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Dere ruller ut oppdateringen i kveld.
translations.sv: Ni rullar ut uppdateringen i kväll.
translations.ro: Voi lansați actualizarea în această seară.
translations.da: I ruller opdateringen ud i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜アップデートをリリースします。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person plural subject pronoun; grammatical subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person plural; agrees with 'Vous'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'mise'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the compound noun phrase 'mise à jour' (software update); direct object of 'déployez'.
Preposition; part of the fixed expression 'mise à jour'.
Common noun, masculine singular; completes the compound 'mise à jour' meaning 'update'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form a temporal noun phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; with 'ce' forms a temporal expression functioning as an adverbial complement.
